summary: DuckDB projection worker sends DDL through read-only subprocess — silent failure
details: duckdb-projection-worker.ts:93 calls DuckDB.Service.run() which spawns duckdb with -readonly flag (db.duckdb.ts:60). CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW is a write operation and silently fails. Error is swallowed by Effect.ignore. See full cartography at docs/json/cartography/truth_closure_lanes_5_6_7.v1.json

summary: Name collision: _ctx_file_relevance defined as both TABLE and VIEW in same namespace
details: schema.duckdb.ts:131 defines _ctx_file_relevance as CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS. duckdb-projection-worker.ts:8 defines the same name as CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW. DuckDB shares namespace between tables and views. The second DDL will fail silently.

summary: _ctx_agent_heatmap referenced in duckdb-rank.ts:191 but never defined anywhere
details: queryAgentHeatmap() queries FROM _ctx_agent_heatmap but no CREATE TABLE or CREATE VIEW for this name exists in schema.duckdb.ts or the projection worker. Runtime query failure.

summary: externalChangesDetected in ContextPacketL1 conflates agent edits with external changes
details: externalChangesDetected = dirtyFiles.length > 0. All git-dirty files count, including files the agent itself just edited. Should subtract agent-owned files from dirty set before computing this boolean.
